text.title: Docker Compose (DevOps) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Docker Compose (DevOps) end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: inventory-services
step.action: Write each service with image + role.

step.name: add-healthchecks
step.action: For each depends_on target, add healthcheck block.

step.name: set-ports-localhost
step.action: Bind external ports to 127.0.0.1; route via reverse proxy.

step.name: declare-volumes
step.action: Use named volumes; document data lifecycle.
